'''âk-th-w''' ('''kakathaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embail|embail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embail|embail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-th-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakathaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikathaw|thikathaw]] || [[word:jikathaw|jikathaw]] || [[word:shikathaw|shikathaw]] || [[word:kikathaw|kikathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukathaw|thuthukathaw]] || [[word:jujukathaw|jujukathaw]] || [[word:shushukathaw|shushukathaw]] || [[word:kukukathaw|kukukathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukathaw|thukathaw]] || [[word:jukathaw|jukathaw]] || [[word:shukathaw|shukathaw]] || [[word:kukathaw|kukathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukathaw|thukathaw]] || [[word:jukathaw|jukathaw]] || [[word:shukathaw|shukathaw]] || [[word:kukathaw|kukathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekathaw|thekathaw]] || [[word:jekathaw|jekathaw]] || [[word:shekathaw|shekathaw]] || [[word:kekathaw|kekathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokathaw|thothokathaw]] || [[word:jojokathaw|jojokathaw]] || [[word:shoshokathaw|shoshokathaw]] || [[word:kokokathaw|kokokathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokathaw|thokathaw]] || [[word:jokathaw|jokathaw]] || [[word:shokathaw|shokathaw]] || [[word:kokathaw|kokathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokathaw|thokathaw]] || [[word:jokathaw|jokathaw]] || [[word:shokathaw|shokathaw]] || [[word:kokathaw|kokathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkathaw|thĂŠkathaw]] || [[word:jĂŠkathaw|jĂŠkathaw]] || [[word:shĂŠkathaw|shĂŠkathaw]] || [[word:kĂŠkathaw|kĂŠkathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakathaw|thathakathaw]] || [[word:jajakathaw|jajakathaw]] || [[word:shashakathaw|shashakathaw]] || [[word:kakakathaw|kakakathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakathaw|thakathaw]] || [[word:jakathaw|jakathaw]] || [[word:shakathaw|shakathaw]] || [[word:kakathaw|kakathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakathaw|thakathaw]] || [[word:jakathaw|jakathaw]] || [[word:shakathaw|shakathaw]] || [[word:kakathaw|kakathaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakathaw|shakathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakathaw|goshakathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakathaw|gokishakathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakathawnĂŒ|shakathawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakathawnknĂŒ|goshakathawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakathawnĂŒ|gokishakathawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakathawshĂ«|shakathawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakathawnkshĂ«|goshakathawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakathawshĂ«|gokishakathawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakathawro|shakathawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakathawnkro|goshakathawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakathawro|gokishakathawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakathawmu|shakathawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakathawnkmu|goshakathawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakathawmu|gokishakathawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakathawsher|shakathawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakathawnksher|goshakathawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakathawsher|gokishakathawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakathawng|shakathawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakathawnkng|goshakathawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakathawng|gokishakathawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakathawya|shakathawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakathawnkya|goshakathawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakathawya|gokishakathawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakathawyam|shakathawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakathawnkyam|goshakathawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakathawyam|gokishakathawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakathawnĂŒshĂ«|shakathawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakathawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakathawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakathawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakathawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakathawnĂŒro|shakathawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakathawnknĂŒro|goshakathawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakathawnĂŒro|gokishakathawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakathawnĂŒmu|shakathawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakathawnknĂŒmu|goshakathawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakathawnĂŒmu|gokishakathawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakathawshĂ«nĂŒ|shakathawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakathawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakathawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakathawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakathawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakathawshĂ«ro|shakathawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakathawnkshĂ«ro|goshakathawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakathawshĂ«ro|gokishakathawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakathawshĂ«mu|shakathawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakathawnkshĂ«mu|goshakathawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakathawshĂ«mu|gokishakathawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakathawronĂŒ|shakathawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakathawnkronĂŒ|goshakathawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakathawronĂŒ|gokishakathawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakathawroshĂ«|shakathawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakathawnkroshĂ«|goshakathawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakathawroshĂ«|gokishakathawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakathawromu|shakathawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakathawnkromu|goshakathawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakathawromu|gokishakathawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakathawmunĂŒ|shakathawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakathawnkmunĂŒ|goshakathawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakathawmunĂŒ|gokishakathawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakathawmushĂ«|shakathawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakathawnkmushĂ«|goshakathawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakathawmushĂ«|gokishakathawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakathawmuro|shakathawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakathawnkmuro|goshakathawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakathawmuro|gokishakathawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a335513}}
